title: NPC Crew Wages Paid
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS total FROM NpcCrewPaidWage WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT NpcCrewName AS label, COALESCE(SUM(Amount), 0) AS value FROM NpcCrewPaidWage WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY NpcCrewName ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} Cr paid in NPC crew wages during the report period. NPC crew quietly drain credits through weekly wages — this chart shows exactly how much your hired hands have cost you and which crew members have been most consistently on the payroll. A well-paid fighter pilot earns back their wages many times over in combat.
details.help: NpcCrewPaidWage Amount is the weekly wage payment. total drives the title as the total crew salary expenditure.

tagLines: NPC crew payroll records compiled. Hired crew weekly wage disbursements noted.
They work every session, whether you notice them or not. The payroll reflects that.
Good NPC crew earns their wages in combat and fighter operations. The pay stub tells you who was really working.
